_governance.retain_reason: host.global_aliases is the explicit cross-layer seam to Eggy host runtime aliases
config runtime refs/constants bridge to Eggy host runtime; classify as host for arch parity

forbidden_dependency_rules.name: ui_no_computer

forbidden_dependency_rules.name: ui_no_rules

forbidden_dependency_rules.name: turn_no_ui

forbidden_dependency_rules.name: player_no_turn

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: player must not depend on ui modules directly
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: player_no_ui

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: player must not depend on host or app modules directly
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: player_no_host_app

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: computer must not depend on turn modules directly
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: computer_no_turn

forbidden_dependency_rules.name: computer_no_ui

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: computer must not depend on host or app modules directly
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: computer_no_host_app

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: rules must stay inner and not depend on turn/ui/computer/host/app
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: rules_no_outer

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: L7 + foundation (state/config/foundation) must not depend on any upper layer (player/computer/rules/turn/ui/host/app)
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: foundation_no_upper

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: host must not depend on ui, turn, player, computer, or rules modules
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: host_no_gameplay_chain

forbidden_dependency_rules.description: ui schema must stay pure and only depend on inner modules / shared seams
forbidden_dependency_rules.name: ui_schema_pure
